questions.prompt: Какой вариант правильно использует 'while' с Past Continuous?

choices.text: While I was cooking, the doorbell rang.
While I cooked, the doorbell rang.
While I was cooking, the doorbell was ringing.
While I cooked, the doorbell was ringing.

questions.explanation: 'While' используется с Past Continuous для обозначения фонового действия.

questions.prompt: Какой вариант правильно передает фон и событие в прошедшем времени?

choices.text: I walked when he called.
I was walking when he called.
I walked when he was calling.
I was walking when he was calling.

questions.explanation: Фоновое действие (идти) в Past Continuous, событие (позвонить) — в Past Simple.

questions.prompt: Какой вариант использует Past Continuous для фона и Past Simple для события?

choices.text: I was cooking when the phone rang.
I cooked when the phone was ringing.
I was cooking when the phone was ringing.
I cooked when the phone rang.

questions.explanation: Фон (готовка) — Past Continuous, событие (звонок) — Past Simple.

questions.prompt: Какой вариант верно описывает фон и событие?

choices.text: She was walking when the bus arrived.
She walked when the bus arrived.
She was walking when the bus was arriving.
She walked when the bus was arriving.

questions.explanation: Фон (ходьба) — Past Continuous, событие (прибытие автобуса) — Past Simple.

questions.prompt: Какой вариант правильно использует Past Continuous для фона?

choices.text: I was watching TV when the power went off.
I watched TV when the power went off.
I was watching TV when the power was going off.
I watched TV when the power was going off.

questions.explanation: Фон (смотрел телевизор) должен быть в Past Continuous.

questions.prompt: Какой вариант верно использует 'when' с Past Simple для события?

choices.text: They were playing when the rain started.
They played when the rain started.
They were playing when the rain was starting.
They played when the rain was starting.

questions.explanation: Событие (начался дождь) в Past Simple, фон — Past Continuous.

questions.prompt: Какой вариант правильно использует Past Simple для события?

choices.text: He was driving when he saw a deer.
He drove when he saw a deer.
He was driving when he was seeing a deer.
He drove when he was seeing a deer.

questions.explanation: Фон (водить машину) — Past Continuous, событие (увидел оленя) — Past Simple.

questions.prompt: Какой вариант верно использует Past Simple для события?

choices.text: I was waiting when the train arrived.
I waited when the train arrived.
I was waiting when the train was arriving.
I waited when the train was arriving.

questions.explanation: Событие (прибытие поезда) в Past Simple, фон — Past Continuous.

questions.prompt: Какой вариант правильно использует 'while' с Past Continuous?

choices.text: While I was sleeping, the alarm went off.
While I slept, the alarm went off.
While I was sleeping, the alarm was going off.
While I slept, the alarm was going off.

questions.explanation: 'While' требует Past Continuous для действия, которое продолжалось.

questions.prompt: Выберите правильное предложение, где действие-событие выражено в Past Simple.

choices.text: I was walking when he was calling.
I walked when he was calling.
I was walking when he was called.
I was walking when he called.

questions.explanation: Действие-событие (он позвонил) должно быть в Past Simple, а фон (я шел) — в Past Continuous. Ошибка в варианте c: 'was called' — событие не должно быть в Past Continuous.
